notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you were looking for may have been moved or the URL is incorrect. Head back home to keep tracking your job search.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: We've logged the issue. Please try again in a moment — if it keeps happening, let us know.

landing.heroSubtitle: An all-in-one job search platform. Track applications, optimize resumes with AI, auto-generate cover letters — all your job search tools in one place.
landing.heroNote: Free plan forever. No credit card required.
landing.featuresTitle: All Job Search Tools in One Platform
landing.featuresSubtitle: Stop switching between tools. Offery integrates everything you need for your job search.
landing.feature1Desc: Smart analysis of job descriptions to generate keyword-optimized resumes that pass ATS screening. Supports multiple resume versions.
landing.feature2Desc: Kanban-style interface to manage all applications. From saved to applied, interview to offer — track every job at a glance.
landing.feature3Desc: Auto-generate customized cover letters based on job descriptions and your resume. Tailored for each position.
landing.feature4Desc: Smart comparison between your resume and job descriptions. Identify missing keywords and get actionable optimization suggestions.
landing.feature5Desc: Visualize your job search data. Application conversion rates, interview success rates, salary analysis — data-driven strategy.
landing.feature6Desc: Centralized management of job search contacts. Track interaction history, set follow-up reminders, systematize networking.
landing.pricingSubtitle: The free plan is already powerful. Upgrade to Pro for full AI capabilities.
landing.freeDesc: For those just starting their job search
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Job Search Journey?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join over 10,000 job seekers who found their dream job with Offery.

coverLetter.title: Cover Letters
coverLetter.subtitle: Use AI to generate customized cover letters for each position
coverLetter.aiGenerateDesc: Select a job and resume, AI will generate a customized cover letter
coverLetter.contentPlaceholder:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the position...

Please find my resume attached. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss further.

Best regards
coverLetter.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this cover letter? This action cannot be undone.

metadata.title: Offery - Smart Job Search Platform
metadata.description: AI-powered job search tool. Track applications, optimize resumes, prepare for interviews — boost your job search efficiency by 58%.
metadata.keywords: job search, AI resume, application tracker, interview prep, job hunt, Offery, resume optimizer, ATS, cover letter

interview.title: AI Interview Simulator
interview.subtitle: Practice real interview scenarios in a safe sandbox — reduce anxiety and fix blind spots.
interview.startSubtitle: We'll generate tailored questions for the {title} role at {company}.
interview.startFailed: Failed to start. Please try again.
interview.requireJobDescription: This job has no description yet. Please edit the job and add a description first.
interview.noResumes: You don't have any resumes yet. Please create one first.
interview.persona_hr_friendly_desc: Focuses on culture fit and motivation
interview.drillDownNote: When enabled, AI will decide whether to probe weak answers with one follow-up — a high-pressure simulation.
interview.answerPlaceholder: Organize your answer with the STAR framework (Situation, Task, Action, Result) and reference real experience from your resume.
interview.completeFailed: Failed to generate report. Please try again.
interview.emptyDesc: Open any job detail page and click "AI Interview" to start practicing.
interview.deleteConfirm: Delete this interview session? This cannot be undone.
interview.radarTrendUp: {delta} points above your average — great progress!
interview.radarTrendDown: {delta} points below your average — start with the weaknesses in the latest report.
interview.bankSubtitle: Save questions worth revisiting — practice at your own pace.
interview.bankEmptyDesc: After completing an interview, you can save questions from the report with one click.
interview.bankNotesPlaceholder: Write down your framework, keywords, or sample answer...
interview.bankDeleteConfirm: Remove this question from your bank?
interview.bannerTitle: This job is heading into the interview stage
interview.bannerDescription: Want to run an AI interview simulation for {company}?
interview.proRequiredDesc: AI Interview is a Pro-only feature. Upgrade to use it without limits.
